data.title: Innovative Industrial Properties Shares Are Falling Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Shares of Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (NYSE: IIPR)  are trading lower after the company reported that PharmaCann, one of its tenants, defaulted on rent obligations for six of eleven leases in December.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Recover From Day's Losses: 'If This Is The Christmas Sell Off And The Top, So Be It,' Trader Says
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets saw volatile trading on Friday despite growing interest in spot ETFs.

data.title: Stock Of The Day: Will Paycom 'Fill The Gap'?
data.description: "Gaps refill" is an old saying on Wall Street. Paycom (PAYC) is trading just above one. The stock may be about to prove this saying is true.
